must_keep: same quantity/count as reference or SKU
product identity described as: small white household deodorizer pack for refrigerator, clean rectangular body, soft matte plastic shell
must_not_invent: unsupported certifications, awards, or review stars
brand logos not present in the input
claims not supported by SKU benefits
reference_priority: SKU title: Поглотитель запаха для холодильника

buyer_read.core_buyer_question: 买家第一眼是否能确认商品、用途和核心好处？
buyer_read.one_sentence_strategy: 每张图只回答一个买家问题；Codex 生成无文字视觉底图，最终俄文由脚本叠加。

designer_delta.note: If paired communication/artist images are available, run prompts/art_director_system.md to fill reusable pattern_bank.

brand_tokens: Russian bold title rendered by overlay script
real hand/lifestyle scene only when it clarifies scale or usage
style_memory.palette_intent: fresh clean home mood, mint green and warm white, airy background

pattern_bank.pattern: One image, one buyer question, one visual answer
pattern_bank.visual_move: choose one focal product/comparison/step/scene and remove weak duplicate details
pattern_bank.avoid: trying to show every Excel benefit in one image

pattern_bank.pattern: Text is overlay, not generated pixels
pattern_bank.visual_move: Codex creates blank title/badge zones; overlay_text.py renders exact Cyrillic
pattern_bank.avoid: asking image model to render long Cyrillic paragraphs

pattern_bank.pattern: Green badge carries the strongest metric
pattern_bank.when_to_use: duration, quantity, dimension, or simple high-value claim exists
pattern_bank.visual_move: put one metric in a round/pill badge near product but not covering it

SLOT: hero-product
DESIGN PARADIGM: hero_spec_badge
BUYER QUESTION: 这是什么，为什么值得点开？
VISUAL ANSWER: A large truthful product hero plus one strong blank badge area for the core metric/benefit.

COMPOSITION:
Focal object: product. Product scale: 55-65%. Camera angle: front or 3/4 product hero angle. Background mood: clean warm commercial studio with green accent shapes.

TEXT SAFE ZONES:
Reserve clean blank areas for later text overlay at: top_title, side_badge, bottom_pill. Use blank rounded panels, badge shapes, or subtle empty areas only. Do NOT render readable Cyrillic or Latin text. Do NOT render fake logos, fake certification seals, or fake review stars.

STYLE:
Silk Life listing style: clean commercial product photography, clear hierarchy, soft but high-contrast lighting, green accent badge shapes, generous negative space, professional Ozon thumbnail readability. Palette intent: fresh clean home mood, mint green and warm white, airy background.

AVOID:
unreadable text; random Cyrillic letters; fake logos; fake certification seals; unsupported awards or review stars; extra product parts; wrong material or color; distorted hands; cluttered collage; tiny paragraphs; dirty colors; low-budget poster look; cropped or hidden product; inconsistent product scale.
